items.title: Lockheed, Pentagon finalize deal for 296 F-35s
items.raw_title: Lockheed, Pentagon finalize deal for 296 F-35s

bd.so_what: Lockheed Martin and the F-35 Joint Program Office finalized the Lots 18 and 19 airframe deal, covering 296 aircraft. For BTX, this is a production and sustainment planning signal tied to a verified Lockheed Martin account, CAGE 81755, and the F-35 Lightning II program.
bd.now_what: Prepare the Lockheed call around F-35 timing, build-to-print capacity, inspection load, and where BTX can support precision components without overpromising.

exec.so_what: The F-35 Lots 18 and 19 agreement keeps Lockheed production demand visible and gives BTX a timely reason to review account coverage, capacity, and open follow-up.
exec.now_what: Assign the account owner to prepare a call brief and confirm whether current BTX capacity can support near-term F-35 related work.

items.confidence_note: Pinned for demo presence with real source attribution. Account resolution still depends on canonical CAGE and program matching.

items.title: Saronic raises $1.75B at $9.25B valuation to scale autonomous warships for US Navy
items.raw_title: Saronic raises $1.75B at $9.25B valuation to scale autonomous warships for US Navy

bd.so_what: Austin-based Saronic raised $1.75 billion at a $9.25 billion valuation and is scaling autonomous maritime vessels from Corsair through larger ship classes. The same source cites a $392 million US Navy production contract, creating a visible supply-chain scaling signal but not a verified BTX account match.
bd.now_what: Qualify Saronic as a net-new Austin prospect. Confirm CAGE, procurement contact, production timing, and which precision components or assemblies are externally sourced before scoring fit as verified.

exec.so_what: Saronic combines major private funding, Navy demand, Austin presence, and rapid shipbuilding scale-up. The opportunity is promising, but BTX lacks qualification evidence.
exec.now_what: Create a qualification work item and draft outreach that asks about manufacturing bottlenecks, supplier qualification, and near-term component needs.

items.confidence_note: Pinned for demo presence with real source attribution. Saronic remains an unlinked prospect because no verified BTX account, CAGE, or contact is present.
